title: VN — NAICS 493120 Refrigerated Warehousing and Storage

sections.title: CFJ (L7 Core Functional Job)
sections.content:
> Preserve the physical integrity, temperature chain, and legal compliance of perishable goods from inbound receipt through outbound dispatch, with auditable traceability and regulatory conformance (HACCP, IFS, BRC, EU FIC).

---

sections.title: L7 — Ecosystem
sections.content:
| Level | Name | Standard |
|---|---|---|
| L7 | Temperature-Controlled Warehousing & Cold Chain Storage Ecosystem | Moore 1993 |

---

sections.title: L6 — Process Steps (Core + Horizontal)
sections.content:
### Core (sequential transformation of goods)
| Code | L6 Node | Job family (verb + object) | Output types served |
|---|---|---|---|
| L6a | Inbound Receiving & Dock Operations | "Accept, inspect, register temperature-sensitive goods" | All (chilled, frozen, deep-freeze, pharma) |
| L6b | Pre-Cool / Tempering / Blast Operations | "Adjust product core temperature before storage" | Frozen (blast), chilled (tempering), pharma (stabilize) |
| L6c | Temperature-Controlled Storage | "Hold goods at SLA setpoint over dwell time" | All |
| L6d | Order Pick & Assembly | "Select and consolidate customer orders within temp envelope" | All |
| L6e | Outbound Dispatch & Dock Loading | "Load refrigerated transport without temperature excursion" | All |

### Horizontal (runs continuously across all core steps)
| Code | L6 Node (H) | Job family |
|---|---|---|
| L6H-REF | Refrigeration & Thermal Management | "Generate and distribute cooling duty to each chamber" |
| **L6H-POWER** | **Energy Supply & Electrical Utilities** | **"Supply reliable electrical energy to all loads; manage cost and resilience"** |
| L6H-QA | Quality, Traceability & Food Safety | "Prove temperature chain integrity and regulatory conformance" |
| L6H-MAINT | Maintenance & Engineering | "Keep equipment available at SLA" |
| L6H-HSE | HSE & Refrigerant Safety | "Protect people and environment from ammonia/CO₂ hazards" |
| L6H-IT | IT/OT & Warehouse Control | "Direct goods, labor, data flows" |

---

sections.title: L5 — Equipment / Product Positions (per L6 node)
sections.content:
### L6a Inbound Receiving
| L5 | Alternatives | Conf |
|---|---|---|
| Dock Leveler & Sealed Airlock | Mechanical / hydraulic / inflatable airlock | MED |
| Truck Scale & Gate Management | Weighbridge + ANPR + dock scheduling | MED |
| Receiving Scanner / RFID Portal | Handheld barcode / fixed RFID gate / vision | MED |

### L6b Pre-Cool / Tempering / Blast
| L5 | Alternatives | Conf |
|---|---|---|
| Blast Freezer | Tunnel / batch-cell / spiral / cryogenic | HIGH |
| Tempering Room | Forced-air / radiant | MED |
| Vacuum / Hydro Pre-Cooler | Produce-specific | LOW |

### L6c Temperature-Controlled Storage
| L5 | Alternatives | Conf |
|---|---|---|
| Pallet Racking | Selective / drive-in / push-back / mobile | HIGH |
| ASRS (Automated Storage & Retrieval) | Crane-ASRS / shuttle / AutoStore deep-freeze | MED |
| Refrigerated Material Handling Equipment | Reach truck (-30 °C pkg) / CB forklift / AGV | HIGH |
| Cold Chamber Enclosure | Insulated panel / low-temp door | HIGH |

### L6d Order Pick & Assembly
| L5 | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| Voice Picking System | Vocollect / Honeywell / Zetes |
| Pick-to-Light / Put-to-Light | Kardex / SSI Schäfer / Knapp |
| Case / Layer Picker (robotic) | Swisslog ACPaQ / Dematic / KNAPP OSR |
| Conveyor & Sortation | Interroll / Interlake / Vanderlande |

### L6e Outbound Dispatch & Dock Loading
| L5 | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| Refrigerated Dock Loading Bay | Standard dock with thermal curtain / strip / air cushion |
| Dock Scheduling Platform | Transporeon / project44 / in-house |

### L6H-REF Refrigeration & Thermal Management
| L5 | Alternatives | Share (DE new-build) | Conf |
|---|---|---|---|
| NH₃ Screw Compressor Plant | GEA / Mayekawa / Vilter / Johnson Controls | 45% | HIGH |
| NH₃/CO₂ Cascade System | GEA / Mayekawa / Star Refrigeration | 35% | HIGH |
| Transcritical CO₂ System | Advansor / Carnot / Epta | 15% | MED |
| Synthetic HFC Plant (legacy) | Various | 5% | MED |
| Evaporators & Air Coolers | Güntner / LU-VE / Kelvion | — | HIGH |
| Evaporative Condensers / Cooling Towers | BAC / EVAPCO / Güntner | — | HIGH |

### **L6H-POWER Energy Supply & Electrical Utilities ← Mein Solar enters here**
| L5 | Alternatives | Conf | Marker |
|---|---|---|---|
| MV Grid Connection & Switchgear | Siemens / ABB / Schneider / Eaton | HIGH | |
| **Battery Energy Storage System (BESS)** | **Tesvolt / Voltfang / Commeo / Fluence / Sungrow / in-house EPC** | **HIGH** | **← Mein Solar PRIMARY POSITION (EPC für Großbatteriespeicher)** |
| On-site PV Generation | Enerparc / BayWa r.e. / Goldbeck / **Mein Solar** | HIGH | ← Mein Solar SECONDARY POSITION (PV-EPC heritage) |
| Diesel / Gas Standby Genset | Caterpillar / MTU / Cummins | HIGH | |
| Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) | Schneider Galaxy / Vertiv / Eaton / Piller | MED | |
| HPC EV Charging for Reefer Trucks | ABB Terra / Alpitronic / Kempower | LOW (emerging) | ← Mein Solar SECONDARY (EV-buffer feature) |
| Energy Management System (EMS) | Entrix / Next Kraftwerke / Enspired / Tiko | MED | |

### L6H-QA Quality, Traceability & Food Safety
| L5 | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| Temperature Monitoring System | Testo Saveris / Elpro / Sensitech / Ellab |
| Traceability / Lot Software | SAP EWM / Manhattan / Infor WMS module |
| Pest Control Program | Rentokil / Anticimex |

### L6H-MAINT Maintenance & Engineering
| L5 | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| CMMS Platform | SAP PM / IBM Maximo / UpKeep |
| Spare Parts Management | Kanban / automated replenishment |
| Refrigeration Service Contract | GEA / Mayekawa / Axima / Engie |

### L6H-HSE HSE & Refrigerant Safety
| L5 | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| NH₃ / CO₂ Gas Detection | Honeywell / MSA / Dräger |
| Emergency Ventilation | Jet fans / purge systems |
| Fire Detection & Suppression | Siemens / Honeywell / Minimax |

### L6H-IT IT/OT & Warehouse Control
| L5 | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| Warehouse Management System (WMS) | SAP EWM / Manhattan / Körber / Infor |
| Transportation Management System (TMS) | Oracle OTM / BluJay / Transporeon |
| SCADA / Building Management System | Siemens Desigo / Honeywell / Schneider EcoStruxure |

---

sections.title: L4 — Subsystems (for Mein Solar's L5 position and adjacent)
sections.content:
### L4 under "Battery Energy Storage System" (Mein Solar PRIMARY)
| L4 | INCOSE role |
|---|---|
| Li-ion Battery Rack (LFP modules + BMS) | Electrochemical energy store |
| Power Conversion System (PCS) | 4-quadrant bidirectional inverter |
| Thermal Management (HVAC + chiller) | Cell temperature control |
| Fire Suppression (NOVEC / aerosol) | Thermal runaway containment |
| Energy Management Controller | Setpoint dispatch logic |
| MV Step-up Transformer | Grid coupling |
| Container Enclosure (20/40ft ISO HC) | IP54 housing |

### L4 under "On-site PV Generation"
| L4 |
|---|
| PV Module (mono-Si) · String Inverter · Roof Mounting · DC Combiner · AC Switchboard |

### L4 under "NH₃ Screw Compressor Plant" (illustrative adjacent)
| L4 |
|---|
| Screw Compressor · Oil Separator · Economizer · Control Panel · Pressure Relief Valve |

---

sections.title: Company Position Markers
sections.content:
```
L7  Temperature-Controlled Warehousing & Cold Chain Storage Ecosystem
  L6H-POWER  Energy Supply & Electrical Utilities
    L5  Battery Energy Storage System (BESS)        ← MEIN SOLAR PRIMARY POSITION
    L5  On-site PV Generation                       ← MEIN SOLAR SECONDARY POSITION
    L5  HPC EV Charging for Reefer Trucks           ← MEIN SOLAR SECONDARY POSITION
```

Mein Solar sits at **L5** in the horizontal utility segment. Cold storage operators buy its BESS as one L5 alternative within their energy layer — not in the core refrigeration or material-handling chain.

---

sections.title: 04e — Direct Competence Transfer Scan
sections.content:
| VN Unit | Level | Competence required | Company has it? | Effort | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| On-site PV Generation | L5 (L6H-POWER) | Module layout, MV coupling, VDE-AR-N 4110 | YES | LOW | Core business; full transfer |
| MV Grid Connection & Switchgear | L5 (L6H-POWER) | MV transformer + switchgear design, DSO interface | PARTIAL | LOW | Already delivered inside every BESS/PV EPC; can be sold standalone for grid-upgrade projects |
| HPC EV Charging for Reefer Trucks | L5 (L6H-POWER) | HPC dispenser integration + BESS buffer | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | EV-buffer feature exists; reefer-truck charging scheduling and 24V auxiliary is new |
| Energy Management System (EMS) | L5 (L6H-POWER) | SoC management, market dispatch, forecast | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | Have EMS for BESS; integrating load-side (compressor dispatch) is gap |
| UPS (Li-ion based) | L5 (L6H-POWER) | Sub-cycle ride-through, IEC 62040 | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | BESS hardware overlaps; static-switch + <10 ms transfer is gap |

HIGH-effort units (Refrigeration plant, WMS, HSE, material handling) excluded.

---

sections.title: 04f — Strategic Adjacency Expansion (within L6H-POWER)
sections.content:
| Adjacent L5 | Current incumbents | Competence gap | Investment | Fit (1–10) | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| On-site PV Generation | Enerparc, BayWa r.e., Goldbeck | — (none) | 0 | 10 | Already in core portfolio; 100% overlap |
| HPC EV Charging (reefer trucks) | Alpitronic, ABB, Kempower | Dispenser integration, fleet scheduling | 6–12 mo, ~€0.5M | 7 | BESS-buffered HPC is Mein Solar's named differentiator; reefer truck logistics is new buyer conversation |
| UPS (Li-ion) | Schneider, Vertiv, Eaton | <10 ms transfer, IEC 62040-3 cert | 12–18 mo, ~€1.5M | 5 | Hardware overlap high; certification and sub-cycle controls are real gap |
| Diesel Genset | CAT, MTU, Cummins | Combustion engineering, fuel systems | >24 mo | 1 | Excluded — <15% overlap, declining segment |
| EMS (cold-store co-optimization) | Entrix, Next Kraftwerke, Tiko | Compressor-load forecasting, HACCP-aware dispatch | 12 mo, ~€0.8M | 6 | Natural add-on to BESS sale; enables combined peak shaving + refrigeration load management value prop |

---

sections.title: 04g — Vertical Move-Up Assessment
sections.content:
| Current | Target (1 level up) | What to add | Competitor at target | Feasibility | Economic rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| L5 BESS under L6H-POWER | L6H-POWER: **integrated Energy Supply for cold storage** | EMS covering PV + BESS + HPC + genset interlock + refrigeration-aware dispatch; O&M wrap | Engie Solutions, Getec, RWE Solutions, E.ON Connecting Energies | **MEDIUM** | Mein Solar already delivers PV + BESS + MV + civil as single EPC. Adding EMS + multi-year O&M turns a capex contract into an "Energy-as-a-Service" L6 integrator role. Target TAM at L6 is ~3× the standalone BESS line. Gap: genset/UPS portfolio, long-term balance-sheet capability, 15-yr service contracting. |

---

sections.title: QA Check
sections.content:
| # | Check | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Q1 | CFJ industry-level, mechanism-free | ✅ |
| Q2 | No orphan nodes | ✅ |
| Q3 | Valid level transitions (L7→L6→L5→L4) | ✅ |
| Q4 | ≥2 L4 children on L5 key positions | ✅ (BESS has 7) |
| Q5 | No solution-specific L7/L6 names | ✅ |
| Q6 | Naming test (industry-standard terms) | ✅ |
| Q7 | Unit count 15–60 | ✅ (~45 units) |
| — | Mein Solar position marked | ✅ (PRIMARY + 2 SECONDARY) |
| — | Built to full depth of company position | ✅ (L5 + L4 beneath) |

---

    {"name": "Screw Compressor", "level": "L4", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "parent_name": "NH3 Screw Compressor Plant", "description": "Rotary twin-screw with VFD"},
    {"name": "Oil Separator", "level": "L4", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "parent_name": "NH3 Screw Compressor Plant", "description": "Compressor-oil recovery"},
    {"name": "Economizer", "level": "L4", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "parent_name": "NH3 Screw Compressor Plant", "description": "Two-stage efficiency improvement"},
    {"name": "Refrigeration Control Panel", "level": "L4", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "parent_name": "NH3 Screw Compressor Plant", "description": "Capacity and safety control"},
    {"name": "Pressure Relief Valve Station", "level": "L4", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "parent_name": "NH3 Screw Compressor Plant", "description": "EN 378 over-pressure protection"}
  ],
  "direct_competence_transfer": [
    {"vn_unit": "On-site PV Generation", "level": "L5", "has_it": "YES", "effort": "LOW", "rationale": "Core incumbent business"},
    {"vn_unit": "MV Grid Connection & Switchgear", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "LOW", "rationale": "Already inside every EPC; sellable standalone for grid upgrades"},
    {"vn_unit": "HPC EV Charging for Reefer Trucks", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "EV-buffer feature exists; reefer-truck scheduling is new"},
    {"vn_unit": "Energy Management System (EMS)", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "BESS EMS exists; cold-store compressor load co-optimization is gap"},
    {"vn_unit": "UPS (Li-ion)", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "Hardware overlaps; IEC 62040-3 sub-cycle transfer is gap"}
  ],

sections.title: Sources
sections.content:
- [NAICS 493120 — Refrigerated Warehousing and Storage (SamSearch)](https://samsearch.co/naics-ai-lookup/493120)
- [Guide to Effective Warehouse Operations (GCCA)](https://www.gcca.org/legacy-system/FinalWarehouseOpsManual2018.pdf)
- [Warehouse Receiving Best Practices 2026 (DataDocks)](https://datadocks.com/posts/warehouse-receiving-process)
- [Food Distribution & Cold Storage Material Handling Guide (LiftOne)](https://www.liftone.net/blog/food-cold-storage-warehouse-guide/)
- [Cold Storage and Ammonia Refrigeration — IIAR transcritical CO₂ vs NH₃ comparison](https://iiarcondenser.org/operating-cost-comparison-between-transcritical-co2-and-ammonia-recirculation-systems-in-a-cold-storage-warehouse/)
- [Refrigerant Options for Cold Storage Facilities (Henderson Engineers)](https://www.hendersonengineers.com/insight_article/options-and-recommendations-for-designing-cold-storage-facilities/)
- [Industrial Refrigeration Compressors — Ammonia & CO₂ (Discovery Designs)](https://www.ddref.com/Manufacturers/IndustrialRefrigerationCompressors)
- [2025 Germany Energy Storage Market Guide — C&I policies (PVB)](https://www.pvb.com/blog/2025-germany-energy-storage-market-guide-policies-bess-selection-industry-trends-complete-citations/)
- ['Moment of truth': 2026 regulatory agenda for large battery storage in Germany (Energy-Storage.News)](https://www.energy-storage.news/moment-of-truth-the-2026-regulatory-agenda-for-large-battery-storage-in-germany/)
- [C&I BESS for German Factory — 1 MWh peak shaving case (SolarEast)](https://www.solareastbess.com/company-news/ci-bess-germany-peak-shaving-energy-storage-solaeast.html)
- [VDE-AR-N 4110 — MV Grid Connection Rules (VDE)](https://www.vde.com/en/fnn/topics/technical-connection-rules/tcr-for-medium-voltage)

rows.Name: Temperature-Controlled Warehousing & Cold Chain Storage Ecosystem

rows.Job family (verb + object): "Hold goods at SLA setpoint over dwell time"
"Select and consolidate customer orders within temp envelope"

rows.Job family: "Generate and distribute cooling duty to each chamber"
**"Supply reliable electrical energy to all loads; manage cost and resilience"**
"Prove temperature chain integrity and regulatory conformance"
"Protect people and environment from ammonia/CO₂ hazards"

rows.Alternatives: Handheld barcode / fixed RFID gate / vision
Reach truck (-30 °C pkg) / CB forklift / AGV
Standard dock with thermal curtain / strip / air cushion
**Tesvolt / Voltfang / Commeo / Fluence / Sungrow / in-house EPC**
rows.Marker: **← Mein Solar PRIMARY POSITION (EPC für Großbatteriespeicher)**

rows.L5: HPC EV Charging for Reefer Trucks

rows.Alternatives: SAP EWM / Manhattan / Infor WMS module

rows.L4: PV Module (mono-Si) · String Inverter · Roof Mounting · DC Combiner · AC Switchboard
Screw Compressor · Oil Separator · Economizer · Control Panel · Pressure Relief Valve

rows.Competence required: MV transformer + switchgear design, DSO interface
rows.Rationale: Already delivered inside every BESS/PV EPC; can be sold standalone for grid-upgrade projects

rows.VN Unit: HPC EV Charging for Reefer Trucks
rows.Rationale: EV-buffer feature exists; reefer-truck charging scheduling and 24V auxiliary is new
Have EMS for BESS; integrating load-side (compressor dispatch) is gap
BESS hardware overlaps; static-switch + <10 ms transfer is gap
BESS-buffered HPC is Mein Solar's named differentiator; reefer truck logistics is new buyer conversation
Hardware overlap high; certification and sub-cycle controls are real gap
Natural add-on to BESS sale; enables combined peak shaving + refrigeration load management value prop

rows.Target (1 level up): L6H-POWER: **integrated Energy Supply for cold storage**
rows.What to add: EMS covering PV + BESS + HPC + genset interlock + refrigeration-aware dispatch; O&M wrap
rows.Competitor at target: Engie Solutions, Getec, RWE Solutions, E.ON Connecting Energies
rows.Economic rationale: Mein Solar already delivers PV + BESS + MV + civil as single EPC. Adding EMS + multi-year O&M turns a capex contract into an "Energy-as-a-Service" L6 integrator role. Target TAM at L6 is ~3× the standalone BESS line. Gap: genset/UPS portfolio, long-term balance-sheet capability, 15-yr service contracting.

rows.Check: ≥2 L4 children on L5 key positions
Built to full depth of company position

entities.cfj_statement: Preserve the physical integrity, temperature chain, and legal compliance of perishable goods from inbound receipt through outbound dispatch, with auditable traceability and regulatory conformance
